name: Susan Rostov's Boiled Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 6 quarts of water to a boil.
2. Add corned beef and cook for 20 minutes until tender.
3. Remove the corned beef with a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. Reduce heat to medium and return the water to a simmer.
5. Add carrots, potatoes, onions, cabbage, and bay leaves.
6. Simmer for 30 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
7. Return the corned beef to the pot and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Stir in the mustard sauce mixture until well combined.
9. Serve hot with corned beef or ham. Makes 3/4 cup.
